_meta.note: Primary rules text: SCION_Pandoras_Box_(Revised_Download).pdf. Twelve discrete ladder steps per Purview in purviews.json (each step one choosable Boon id for UI/export); tier books when PB cross-references them. Regenerate with: python3 scripts/generate_boons_catalog.py

eligibility.purview: Required Purview id; character must hold this Purview.
eligibility.dot: Ladder height (1–12) for sort order and default legendMin when legendMin omitted.
eligibility.tierMin: Minimum tier: hero | demigod | god (dots 1–4 / 5–8 / 9–12 by default).
eligibility.legendMin: Minimum Legend (defaults to dot if omitted).
eligibility.requiresBoonIds: Prior step(s) on this ladder that must already be chosen.
eligibility.callingAnyOf: Optional: character.callingId must match one id.
eligibility.pantheonAnyOf: Optional: character.pantheonId must match one id.
eligibility.deityAnyOf: Optional: character.parentDeityId must match one id.

arcaneCalculus_dot_01.name: Disturbing Visions
arcaneCalculus_dot_01.description: By reading Mythos scripts or inscribing geometries, you receive a vision-compulsion: your Short-Term Deed becomes a minor Mythos mission for the session. Completing it grants 1 Awareness and 1 Legend; afterward you can see beings touched by the Mythos.
arcaneCalculus_dot_01.mechanicalEffects: Cost: Free. Duration: Instant. Subject: Self. Action: Simple. Once per session.

arcaneCalculus_dot_02.name: Mouth of Madness
arcaneCalculus_dot_02.description: Speak of an investigation target; everyone in range babbles everything they know. You gain Enhancement 3 on follow-up investigative actions for the session and +1 Scale when acting on those clues where appropriate.
arcaneCalculus_dot_02.mechanicalEffects: Cost: Spend 1 Awareness. Duration: One scene. Clash: Presence + Legend vs. Resolve + Legend. Range: Short. Action: Simple.
